title: Gone But Not Forgotten
summary: A disk image still contains a deleted note, and the flag is recoverable with basic filesystem forensics.
scenario: Investigators seized a laptop image after a suspect tried to remove a sensitive text file before the handoff. The visible files are mostly noise, but the deleted data is still recoverable. Solvers need to inspect the image with forensic tooling, recover the deleted note, and submit the flag it contains.
learningObjectives: Recover deleted evidence from a raw disk image
Compare quick triage with deeper filesystem analysis tools

artifacts.name: README_FIRST.txt
artifacts.purpose: Introductory case note explaining the investigation goal

artifacts.name: laptop.img
artifacts.purpose: Disk image containing a deleted text file with the flag

hints: Start with a quick strings pass before moving to heavier forensic tooling.
If you load the image in Autopsy, inspect deleted content instead of only allocated files.
Carving tools can recover content even after a file is deleted.
